goal: Enable session recovery for interrupted team implementations, add skills documentation, and update agent awareness

tasks.name: Add team-implement recovery to /resume
tasks.action: Extend Step 3b to detect interrupted team implementations from memory state (in-progress epics with children). Show completion status and suggest /team implement to resume.

tasks.name: Add Team Implementation skill
tasks.action: Add Team Implementation skill section after Memory Task Management. Include checklist: verify plan, generate descriptions, create team, spawn implementers, delegate mode, monitor, handle failures, recovery.

tasks.name: Update agent awareness for team context
tasks.action: Add Team Context note to Memory Engine Integration section of code-reviewer and test-writer agents. Brief note about coordinating with implementer teammates via TaskList.
verify: grep -q 'Team Context' .claude/agents/code-reviewer.md && grep -q 'Team Context' .claude/agents/test-writer.md && echo OK

planVerify: grep -q 'team implement' .claude/commands/resume.md && grep -q 'Team Implementation' docs/skills.md && python3 scripts/workflow_validate.py
commitMessage: feat(team-implement-integration): add recovery, documentation, and agent awareness
